response.original_title: メルカリPresents NEO GLOBAL TAG LEAGUE 2026
response.overview: Neo Global Tag League 2026 ~ Day 11 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Pro Wrestling NOAH, held on June 13, 2026 at Kiramesse Numazu in Numazu, Shizuoka, Japan. It served as the eleventh and penultimate show for the promotion's round-robin tag team tournament.
response.title: メルカリPresents NEO GLOBAL TAG LEAGUE 2026
